name: builder-growth
description: AI growth quality enforcement: 14 skills and 5 agents that enforce quality across the full growth lifecycle. Covers growth strategy, channel selection, offer validation, campaign briefs, launch planning, growth metrics, experiment design, funnel analysis, retention design, social proof review, pricing page review, copy quality gates, positioning audit, and AI messaging review.

Covers growth strategy, channel selection, offer validation, campaign briefs, launch planning, growth metrics, experiment design, funnel analysis, retention design, social proof review, pricing page review, copy quality gates, positioning audit, and AI messaging review.
